scripts.ingest:index: pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/storage build && pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/ingestion build && node scripts/index-graph-relations.mjs
scripts.ingest:retry: pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/storage build && pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/ingestion build && node scripts/ingest-workflow.mjs retry
scripts.ingest:run: pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/storage build && pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/ingestion build && node scripts/ingest-workflow.mjs run
scripts.ingest:parse: pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/storage build && pnpm --filter @pufu-lens/ingestion build && node scripts/parse-raw-documents.mjs
